modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Errors when trying to sync RSS feeds in Outlook

full_description_text:  
So, I’m having this really annoying issue with Outlook where I keep getting these errors about RSS feeds. Every time I try to start it up, I have to go into safe mode, which is just a hassle, you know? The error message says something like "Task 'RSS Feeds' reported error (0x80004005)" and it keeps saying that it can't process the RSS content from these links. It’s just super frustrating because I don’t even know what’s wrong or why it’s happening!
short_description: Errors when trying to sync RSS feeds in Outlook
